goal: Transform poetry into music through AI-assisted composition while preserving human creative intent
vision: Every poem becomes a unique musical expression that resonates emotionally
problemSolved: Poetry has limited audience reach; music reaches broader audiences
usp: Human-created poetry transformed into AI-enhanced music (Suno) that maintains artistic integrity
mvp: Basic music generation through Suno integration
Distribution to Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music

validation.methodology: Streaming numbers, playlist additions, listener retention
validation.successCriteria: 1000+ streams per track, playlist inclusion on 3+ curated playlists
